headline: Freehold townhomes under construction in Mississauga's Lisgar neighbourhood.
description_short: A new freehold townhouse community by Mattamy Homes Canada at 6578 Ninth Line in Mississauga's Lisgar neighbourhood, offering 19 floor plans from 1,343 to 2,420 sq ft.
description_long: The Nine is a townhouse community in the Lisgar area of Mississauga, near Ninth Line. Homes range from 2 to 4 bedrooms and 3 to 4 bathrooms, priced from $749,990 to $959,990 CAD, with transit access via MiWay and GO Transit.
hero_image_alt: The Nine, Mississauga — aerial view at dusk
sales_centre_address: 6578 Ninth Line, Mississauga, ON, L5N 0C1, CA
import_notes: storeys and total_units not stated (19 = number of floor plans, not units). Livabl shows a 'Featured' badge, but is_featured kept false per seed policy. Page lists average price/sqft as $449.
